steps.title: Use two points on the fit line
steps.content: For a line-of-best-fit slope question, use two points on the drawn line, not necessarily two data points. The line passes through approximately $(0,3.2)$ and $(2,4.4)$.

steps.title: Calculate the slope
steps.content: $$m=\frac{4.4-3.2}{2-0}=\frac{1.2}{2}=0.6$$ Desmos gives the same result from the two-row table regression.

steps.title: Match the answer
steps.content: The slope of the line of best fit is closest to $0.60$. The other choices, $2.50$, $7.80$, and $8.00$, are far too steep for the drawn line. Choice A is correct.
